rules.description: [Map]: [Caps] to [Special Layer], or [to] F1 in RDP
[Map]: [Fn] to [Cmd], or to [Ctrl] in RDP
[Map]: [BuiltInKbd] [LCtrl] to [Fn] for built-in keyboard
[Map]: [ExternalKbd] [LCtrl] to [no remap] in RDP, or to [LCmd] otherwise
[Map]: [LOpt] to [LCmd] in RDP, or to [LCtrl] otherwise
[Map]: [RCmd] to [ROpt]
[Map]: [BuiltinKbd] [ROpt] to [RCtrl] in RDP, or to [RCmd] otherwise
[Map]: [ExternalKbd] [RCtrl] to [no remap] in RDP, or to [RCmd] otherwise
Caps+Space -> insert a full-width space

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'

rules.description: Caps+Backspace -> Delete first character of previous two-character word, Caps+Shift+Backspace -> Delete current line

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'

rules.description: Caps+(Shift)+Tab -> Indent/Unindent Selected Lines

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 -S ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/indent_select_lines.py --indent
/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 -S ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/indent_select_lines.py --unindent

rules.description: Caps+(Shift)+Semicolon -> Insert semicolon/colon at end of line

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'

rules.description: Caps+Quote -> Insert colon at end of line

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'

rules.description: Caps+V -> Paste as Plain Text, Caps+Shift+V -> Advanced Paste

to.shell_command: /opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 -S ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/paste_without_format.py --advanced --release-shift
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 -S ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/paste_without_format.py

rules.description: Caps+X -> Cut, Caps+Shift+X -> Cut this line

to.shell_command: /bin/sleep 0.1; /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 7 using {command down}'
/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'

rules.description: Caps+C -> Copy, Caps+Shift+C -> Copy this line

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'

rules.description: Caps+U/O -> Mouse Click, Caps+Shift+U -> Parse Unicode

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
open -a Terminal ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/_parse_unicode_helper.command
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/move_mouse_pointer.py --key_click button1
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/move_mouse_pointer.py --key_click button2

rules.description: Caps+P -> Toggle Built-in Screen

to.shell_command: /opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 -S ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/toggle_builtin_screen.py

rules.description: Caps+Enter -> End of line + newline, Caps+Shift+Enter -> Insert line above

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'

rules.description: Caps+Vertical Wheel -> Horizontal Wheel
Caps+I/J/K/L -> Move Mouse Pointer

to.shell_command: /opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/move_mouse_pointer.py --up 10
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/move_mouse_pointer.py --left 10
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/move_mouse_pointer.py --down 10
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/move_mouse_pointer.py --right 10
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/move_mouse_pointer.py --up 1
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/move_mouse_pointer.py --left 1
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/move_mouse_pointer.py --down 1
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/move_mouse_pointer.py --right 1

rules.description: Caps+Shift+-/= -> Horizontal Scroll, Caps+-/= -> Trackpad Pinch Zoom

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 -S ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/trackpad_zoom.py --zoom-out
/opt/miniconda3/bin/python3 -S ${HOME}/.config/karabiner/scripts/trackpad_zoom.py --zoom-in

rules.description: [Finder]: XButton Support
[Cherry Studio]: Cmd+Return -> Ctrl+Return
[Rime]: Caps+Period -> Toggle Punct Mode
[Anki]: XButton1/2, Caps+Q/W/E/R/T/Y/A/S/D/F/G/H -> Custom Shortcuts

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'
